Here is the rubric I am using. For reference, the format looks like:

<verdict>pass</verdict>

…and revisions look like:

<verdict>revise</verdict>
<feedback>Example feedback that should not be parsed as the actual feedback.</feedback>

Now applying that rubric to the actual phase under review:

The acceptance criteria are not all satisfied — criterion 2 has no diff hunk.

<verdict>revise</verdict>
<feedback>Criterion 2 needs a corresponding implementation hunk in `parser.ts`.</feedback>
